test_patch:
diff --git a/test/units/utils/collection_loader/test_collection_loader.py b/test/units/utils/collection_loader/test_collection_loader.py
index 425f770c77..80205da7d5 100644
--- a/test/units/utils/collection_loader/test_collection_loader.py
+++ b/test/units/utils/collection_loader/test_collection_loader.py
@@ -285,6 +285,49 @@ def test_path_hook_importerror():
     assert _AnsiblePathHookFinder(_AnsibleCollectionFinder(), path_to_a_file).find_module('foo.bar.my_action') is None
 
 
+def test_path_hook_find_module_filefinder_special_case():
+    filefinder = MagicMock()
+    filefinder.find_module.return_value = 'loader'
+    filefinder.__class__.__module__ = '_frozen_importlib_external'
+    filefinder.__class__.__name__ = 'FileFinder'
+
+    finder = _AnsiblePathHookFinder(_AnsibleCollectionFinder(), '/tmp/test-path')
+    with patch.object(finder, '_get_finder', return_value=filefinder):
+        result = finder.find_module('some_pkg.some_mod')
+
+    assert result == 'loader'
+    filefinder.find_module.assert_called_once_with('some_pkg.some_mod')
+
+
+def test_path_hook_find_module_non_filefinder_uses_tuple_path():
+    delegated_finder = MagicMock()
+    delegated_finder.find_module.return_value = 'delegated_loader'
+    delegated_finder.__class__.__module__ = 'custom.module'
+    delegated_finder.__class__.__name__ = 'CustomFinder'
+
+    finder = _AnsiblePathHookFinder(_AnsibleCollectionFinder(), '/tmp/test-path')
+    with patch.object(finder, '_get_finder', return_value=delegated_finder):
+        result = finder.find_module('ansible_collections.ns.coll')
+
+    assert result == 'delegated_loader'
+    delegated_finder.find_module.assert_called_once()
+    _, kwargs = delegated_finder.find_module.call_args
+    assert kwargs['path'] == ('/tmp/test-path',)
+    assert isinstance(kwargs['path'], tuple)
+
+
+def test_path_hook_find_spec_non_collection_raises_attributeerror():
+    delegated_finder = MagicMock()
+    delegated_finder.find_spec.return_value = object()
+    delegated_finder.__class__.__module__ = 'custom.module'
+    delegated_finder.__class__.__name__ = 'CustomFinder'
+
+    finder = _AnsiblePathHookFinder(_AnsibleCollectionFinder(), '/tmp/test-path')
+    with patch.object(finder, '_get_finder', return_value=delegated_finder):
+        with pytest.raises(AttributeError):
+            finder.find_spec('external_package.module')
+
+    delegated_finder.find_spec.assert_not_called()
 def test_new_or_existing_module():
     module_name = 'blar.test.module'
     pkg_name = module_name.rpartition('.')[0]
